articles.title: Bowen: 'Middle East is in turmoil' as Iran and Israel attack each other
articles.description: The BBC's international editor, Jeremy Bowen, said the public are "right to be worried" as the consequences of the war will be felt for generations.

articles.title: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
articles.description: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.

articles.title: Nottingham attacks inquiry revealed miscarriage of justice, victim's mother says
articles.description: The bereaved families of the victims of Valdo Calocane speak at a press conference in London.

articles.title: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
articles.description: A volunteer diver has described shaking as he filmed his encounter with an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily.
